message:
fix: add missing clipboard and picker handlers to CDP events

The console message handlers for clipboard sync, clipboard read request,
and file picker were defined in viewer.zig but never called. Events go
through cdp_events.handleConsoleMessage which was missing these handlers.

- Add __TERMWEB_CLIPBOARD__ handler (browser → system clipboard)
- Add __TERMWEB_CLIPBOARD_REQUEST__ handler (system → browser clipboard)
- Add __TERMWEB_PICKER__ handler (native file picker)
- Make clipboard handlers public for cdp_events to call
